mapper.select:
select course_id, course_code, course_name from course
and course_code like concat('%', #{courseCode}, '%')
and course_name like concat('%', #{courseName}, '%')
order by course_id limit #{pageSize} offset #{offset}

select count(*) from course
and course_code like concat('%', #{courseCode}, '%')
and course_name like concat('%', #{courseName}, '%')
